# Raw Extraction

```markdown
#### _Division B 8.4.4.21._
|Col1|Table 8.4.4.21.-E Electric Air-Source Heat Pump Equipment Part-Load Performance Characteristics Forming Part of Sentences 8.4.4.10.(5), 8.4.4.13.(2) and 8.4.4.21.(1)|
|---|---|
|Electric Air-Source<br>Heat Pump<br>Heating Capacity<br>Adjustment<br>Curve(s)|This curve or group of curves represents the available heating capacity of the heat pump as a function of evaporator and<br>condenser conditions.<br>(1)<br>where<br>Qavailable = available heating capacity at present evaporator and condenser<br>conditions, in MBH,<br>CAP_FTEAS = heating capacity adjustment determined using Equation (2), and<br>Qrated = rated capacity at ARI conditions, in MBH.<br>(2)<br>where<br>todb = outside-air dry-bulb temperature, in °F,<br>a = 0.2536714,<br>b = 0.0104351,<br>c = 0.0001861, and<br>d = –0.0000015.|
|Electric Air-Source<br>Heat Pump<br>Heating Efficiency<br>Adjustment<br>Curve(s)|This curve or group of curves varies the heating efficiency of the heat pump as a function of evaporator and condenser<br>conditions and part-load ratio.<br>(3)<br>where<br>Poperating = power draw at specified operating conditions, in kW,<br>Prated = rated power draw at ARI conditions, in kW,<br>EIR_FPLR = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to changes in heat<br>pump load determined using Equation (4),<br>EIR_FT = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to environmental<br>variables determined using Equation (6), and<br>CAP_FTEAS = heating capacity adjustment determined using Equation (2).<br>(4)<br>where<br>PLR = part-load ratio based on available capacity (not rated capacity) determined<br>using Equation (5),<br>a = 0.0856522,<br>b = 0.9388137,<br>c = –0.1834361, and<br>d = 0.1589702.<br>(5)<br>where<br>Qoperating = present load on heat pump, in Btu/h, and<br>Qavailable = heat pump available capacity at present evaporator and condenser<br>conditions, in Btu/h, determined using Equation (1).<br>(6)<br>where<br>todb = outside-air dry-bulb temperature, in °F,<br>a = 2.4600298,<br>b = –0.0622539,<br>c = 0.0008800, and<br>d = –0.0000046.|
```
